_comment: Copy this file to dev/test/prod-environment-variables.json and replace all REPLACE-WITH-* values.
_docs: See docs/architecture-overview.md for how to find each value.

EnvironmentVariables._description: AAD Object ID (GUID) of the Company Equipment Leader user. Find in Azure AD > Users > [name] > Object ID.
AAD Object ID of the CCI Director of Equipment.
AAD Object ID of the Company President.
Teams channel ID for the Payroll notification channel. Find in Teams > channel > Get link to channel > extract the groupId and channelId.
Full URL of the published Vehicle Allowance Portal canvas app.
Minimum AI validation score (0-100) required for auto-approval eligibility. Recommended: 75 for early deployment, raise to 85 after model tuning.
Number of days after becoming eligible within which an employee must opt in. Per policy: 60.
JDBC/ODBC SQL endpoint URL for Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse. Used to query employee PersonnelNumber and job title from Dynamics data.

ConnectionReferences._description: Microsoft Teams connector connection ID for this environment.
SQL Server connector connection ID pointing to Fabric Lakehouse SQL endpoint.
SharePoint connector connection ID for policy documents and training data library.
